scripts.dev:cloudflare: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4.107.1 pages dev dist
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@4.107.1 pages deploy dist --project-name=arroyo-marketing
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx --yes netlify-cli@24.0.1 deploy --no-build --prod --dir dist --site=c5e9c275-b622-4f34-b3cb-de22b98c884e
